name: vivarium
description: Local comparative-genomics analysis workflow: an umbrella orchestrator plus standalone modules for sequence search (BLAST/DIAMOND/HMMER), QC+assembly+annotation, orthology+ANI/AAI+synteny, alignment+tree+selection (dN/dS), and figures. Hybrid execution: light analyses run in the bio_tools conda env, heavy/long jobs are scaffolded as ready-to-run commands. Depends on no other skill.
